negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_032
prompt: The video opens with a close-up view of a miniature kitchen countertop, featuring a wooden surface with various items: a metallic wok with a handle, a pink-handled spoon, and an orange cloth. Two cans are also present—one labeled "Tomato Sauce" with a red label and tomato image, and the other labeled "Pineapple Slices" with a yellow label and pineapple image. A microwave oven with a teal front and orange buttons is partially visible in the background. A robotic arm, positioned above the countertop, moves smoothly from the top left corner towards the center-right of the frame, suggesting it might be preparing to interact with one of the objects on the counter. The robotic arm's movement is deliberate, and it gently presses down on the orange cloth, simulating the action of cleaning the countertop. The scene is set in a cozy, domestic kitchen environment, with warm lighting enhancing the realistic feel of the miniature setup. A medium shot captures the robotic arm's interaction with the orange cloth, emphasizing the cleaning process.
